description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow that builds a single Python wheel. The workflow takes four inputs: python-version, os, arch, and TESTPYPI_VERSION. It checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.13.x, installs dependencies, determines the TestPyPi/PyPi version, and uses cibuildwheel to build and test wheels for the specified OS and architecture. The workflow then uploads the resulting wheel files as artifacts.
